_fragment_note: kind 'writer' (not 'gate') because end-manifest.sh itself never blocks -- it only writes/validates a structured artifact. The validator's PASS/FAIL verdict becomes gate-relevant only once stop-verdict-dispatcher.sh (task E.11, its own manifest entry in ../E.11/manifest-entry.json) actually calls 'end-manifest.sh validate' at sec E.W integration -- that call site does not exist yet on this branch (documented, not wired, per sec E.0.1 rule 1 -- settings.json.template/wiring decisions are orchestrator-only).
